Intraday post (15/Sept)

Monthly post:

SEPTEMBER - Monthly & Weekly post (02-05/Sept)

Weekly post:

OpEx week, FOMC, Risk of Reversion - Weekly post (15-19/Sept)

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

This positioning is again a short fly profile with net negative speed with centroid of 6594.18 - 6604.31The local speed profiles of the fly are very steep (positive speed below the centroid, and negative speed above. And the speed profile is 2.86x steeper above the centroid).So, the positioning is very much right-tailish, and the pivots are very close to each others. Not a coincidence that speed is heavily sold at the right-tail…It is usually a pinning environment towards the centroid, waiting for FOMC.

So, the main force that has a potential to pin is within the centroid, but due to the local weighted gamma cluster, I add a margin of error of 6585 to the pinning area. This pretty much holds back the right-tail scenario.

Upside pivot is 6604, this is from where right-tail can catch up, but it seems capped at 6615 (margin of error is 6620) by vanna, but a fast long vol trade should work here.It can be materialized only if call skew catches bid at the pivot and upside vol gets realized in intraday vol!However, spot is expectet to reverse towards 6590 after…

Downside is less liketo be hit, but the pivot is at 6578.74, but you need 6563 to test the skew, if the put skew catches bid and vol-up gets realized in the intraday vol.Downside target is 6548/50 zone. From here, spot expected to revert back up, but if it can’t make above 6565 until 2.45PM, then 6560 can pin, otherwise it is the centroid range.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

Today is a typical premium selling day. Odds favor for left-tail selling, bcs the primarly bet is a pin in the centroid with potential upward moves and reversions through the day.
